reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Asheville Testosterone Clinic. #1 reason is I actually got the results I had been looking for 10 years prior. I was grinding through my 40's, had no energy and significant weight gain. A colleague encouraged me to reach out to Asheville Testosterone Clinic and I'm so glad I did. The care is top notch and personal.

I have not experienced concierge-level care up to now and I won't go back to the traditional approach which took away my time and often left me with more questions than answers on my health. Dr. Seib and PA English makes you feel like you are the only patient on his mind and you can tell his goal is to improve your health but, on your time, and your terms. A true partner in my health.

He wants to make sure I know why we are doing what we are doing and that I am fully informed. I know this level of support or expertise is not something I would have been able to get from big box hormone clinics or providers that do hormones part time or as an aside. That is important to me. Having worked in healthcare myself, I can confidently say that having direct access to my provider like this is incredibly rare but what I needed to feel my best.

Since starting treatment, I’ve experienced tremendous weight loss, noticeable hair regrowth, and a huge boost in energy and mental clarity. Dr Seib and PA English truly understand men’s and women’s hormone health (my wife also started here after my experience), and everything is specific to my labs, my symptoms, and my goals, and I know to them my progress matters.

As a busy exec, the telemedicine option makes everything incredibly convenient. Appointments are on time, there’s no waiting, and I can call or text with questions and actually hear back from someone the same day who knows my medical history. That alone sets this clinic apart.

Combining care with medical weight loss options, testosterone optimization for those with low T, and longevity-focused care all at a lower cost than other clinics I reached out to. Here, they know your name, your history, and they know you.

If you’re looking for a trusted hormone clinic, testosterone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, help with hair loss or concierge telemedicine care that delivers real results, this is hands down the best option. I feel better than I have in years.
Highly recommend!!

reviews.text:
I honestly can't recommend Asheville Testosterone Clinic in Asheville, NC highly enough for women's hormone therapy and holistic care. I'm a mom of 3 busy boys and I was dealing with literal constant fatigue, mood swings, brain fog, poor sleep, and just feeling off for months, going on a year. I was honestly starting to lose hope after having tried so many things. From the moment I contacted them, they provided truly personalized hormone care that made me feel heard and supported. Rare in today's world!!!

What made the biggest difference for me was meeting the same providers, Dr. Seib and PA English, every single time without the never-ending rotating providers or rushed visits so they really got to know me and my individual situation, issues, goals, etc.  Each appointment was thorough, with detailed lab reviews and real attention to how I was feeling day-to-day. Dr. Seib and PA English took their time and built a custom hormone optimization plan that combined HRT with a tailored supplemental program designed specifically for my bloodwork, symptoms, and lifestyle.  We made small, thoughtful adjustments along the way, scheduled close follow-up appointments to track progress and fine-tune everything so I wasn't going weeks of not feeling as could as I could have been.

The results have been life-changing - the biggest change was in my energy (my biggest ask!) and when I say I felt better…. in literally 1 week of treatment!! I was amazed and I finally feel like myself again. All of this without any harsh side effects, feeling over-treated, or under-treated. The level of attention to detail and consistent, one-on-one doctor care truly sets this clinic apart from other women’s health clinics or hormone therapy providers I’ve experienced. The telemedicine option made it super easy with my busy schedule and I cannot tell you how good it feels to have Dr. Seib and PA English in my back pocket.

If you’re a woman in Asheville searching for custom hormone care or tailored hormone optimization with dedicated, ongoing doctor support, Asheville Testosterone Clinic
is the best choice, hands down. I’m so grateful I found them!!

reviews.text: Heard good reviews but once there it was such a money grab. All they wanted to do was prescribe me the testosterone and get my money. The provider never explained the risks and benefits, side effects, or how long it would take to work. She asked questions, told me I needed the shots, then sent me to the front desk without so much as asking me if I had questions. The provider seemed so annoyed and ready to get me out of her office.  I didn’t even know how much it was going to cost until they were asking for my credit card. Then they injected me with my first dose but didn’t teach me how to do it on my own. I had to YouTube it. I want the testosterone but wish I didn’t have to go back here to get it.

reviews.text:
I cannot say enough wonderful things about my medical weight loss experience at House of Aesthetics. From the moment I walked in, the entire team made me feel supported, encouraged, and truly cared for. They take the time to listen, explain every step of the process, and celebrate your wins right along with you.
Not only have I had an amazing experience — I feel incredible. The confidence, energy, and overall wellbeing I’ve gained through this program have been life-changing. The team here is knowledgeable, compassionate, and genuinely committed to helping you reach your goals in a safe and sustainable way.
If you are thinking about starting your own journey, I cannot recommend House of Aesthetics enough. They don’t just transform your body… they help you transform your life. I’m so grateful for this experience and the amazing people who guided me through it!

reviews.text: The ladies at HOA have truly changed my life. I feel the healthiest and happiest I have ever felt. The medical weight loss journey I have been on has been incredible. Phenomenal results and guidance. The support from HOA on my self care journey has been the biggest blessing. I have had fillers and walk in tox which has boosted my self confidence 100%. I’m in my 50’s and feel like I’m in my 30’s!! And from peoples comments/compliments - I look it as well. Truly thankful for HOA and the amazing ladies that have me feeling and looking my best!!!! LIFE CHANGING!!!!!

reviews.text:
HoA Health and Hormone is truly a gem. Their medical weight‑loss program is thoughtful, personalized, and grounded in real expertise. You can tell immediately that the staff is incredibly knowledgeable—they don’t just hand you a plan, they take the time to connect your goals with the actual process so you understand why each step matters.

The atmosphere is one of my favorite parts. It’s comfortable, welcoming, and completely free of the usual clinical stiffness. Honestly, it feels more like hanging out with your sister who just happens to know everything about wellness and aesthetics.

If you’re looking for a place where you feel supported, understood, and genuinely cared for, HoA Health and Hormone is the place to be!

reviews.text:
I am writing to share feedback regarding a recent consultation involving my husband. He contacted your office to inquire about restorative therapy and included me on the call so I could listen in.

I would like to begin by acknowledging the young woman at the front who initially assisted us, the MA, as well as Joey. All three were exceptional, professional, informative, and very pleasant to speak with. Their communication and demeanor reflected positively on your organization.

Unfortunately, our experience changed once we spoke with the physician. While she initially presented as kind, her tone and mannerisms quickly became dismissive and carried a condescending, sarcastic undertone. As a healthcare professional myself, I found her approach concerning. At no point should a patient feel undermined or spoken down to, and that was the impression left by this interaction.

Due to this experience, we were very displeased and ultimately chose to move forward with a different GameDay. I felt it was important to share this feedback, as patient communication and respect are critical to quality care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJP3uWq7hJRSERSRVCQZ89NVM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWWWF6aEtRVWczYW01T1dFOVhNVFYzV2pSVlZtYxAB
reviews.text:
I started working with TRT Kingdom about eight weeks ago. When I first came across them, I was a bit skeptical—I had been researching TRT clinics for a while, and their prices seemed almost too reasonable. I decided to give them a try, and it has truly been a game changer.

My energy and focus have improved dramatically, and my sleep quality is better than it has been in years. The doctors are professional, attentive, and genuinely listen to your concerns. They focus on optimizing your health and performance, not just pushing a one‑size‑fits‑all treatment.

I’ve gained around six pounds of lean muscle mass since starting, and I usually work with Jason, who has been excellent. One of the best things about TRT Kingdom is their responsiveness every time I call, someone actually answers and helps with any questions I have.

The process is smooth and efficient: you receive your lab work by email right away, and once you place your order, your prescription arrives within three business days. Overall, it has been a great experience, and I’m looking forward to continuing my treatment with TRT Kingdom.

reviews.name: places/ChIJP3uWq7hJRSERSRVCQZ89NVM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oM2FFSjFUMFZFWW1OT1NrWk9Vbk0yZWpoUE9XYxAB
reviews.text:
My experience with TRT Kingdom has been nothing short of exemplary. From the very beginning, their customer service demonstrated a level of professionalism and attentiveness that is truly unparalleled. Every interaction was handled with precision, clarity, and genuine care for my long term goals, both physically and mentally.

I want to give a special shout out to Nick and Joseph. Speaking with Nick was like talking with a friend I’ve known for years. We laughed, we handled business efficiently, and everything remained professional and streamlined. They have a way of making the entire process feel comfortable while still being highly informative and structured. Those guys are AWESOME!!

As an added bonus, they even sent me a free TRT Kingdom t shirt. The quality is outstanding, the fit is perfect, and it feels great especially heading into summertime as I continue working toward being in the best shape of my life. It feels good representing a company that takes such a meticulous and transformative approach to men’s health.

If you are looking for a team that combines expertise, integrity, and authentic customer care, I highly recommend TRT Kingdom.

reviews.name: places/ChIJP3uWq7hJRSERSRVCQZ89NVM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s1b1UydHljMVI1YzJwU1dqZHNSbEJxUVRoYVZVRRAB
reviews.text:
I shopped around for several weeks and contacted many different companies for consults before deciding to go with TRT Kingdom.

They set up an appointment for me within 24 hours, I had my consult and they set up the blood test at a facility near my house. Once the tests were done I had my meds in less than a week.

They were friendly, it didn’t feel rushed, and they answered all of the questions I had beforehand. There was no unnecessary sales pitch and they helped me get what I needed at the dosage that was fit for my needs.

A few days later I had a question and called their phone number and a human actually answered which is a rarity among many of these companies.

After I started my treatment they frequently check in with me to see how I’m doing. The price for TRT simply can’t be beat and I feel well taken care of.

And yes, I am a REAL patient. I’m writing this review because I want people to know that TRT Kingdom is the real deal and they truly care about their patients. I couldn’t be happier with my choice and I’m glad I went with TRT Kingdom.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUVrdQSq4kRZdEhV-fspYQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDcHZXT3dBRRAB
reviews.text: What a great experience!  Dr Wallin and Mark are the best! Looking forward to getting on the right track to be healthy again. Fabulous team of professionals, I would recommend them to everyone wanting to lose weight and get back in shape. It has been two weeks now and I have lost about 10 pounds, it’s crazy how I have heard this all my life but they put it in perspective!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUVrdQSq4kRZdEhV-fspYQ/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlb3F1aklREAE
reviews.text: A great experience- from beginning until the end! Actually, it’s just the beginning but I know this is a great team and thrilled I am totally on the same page as Dr. Wallin. Shout out to Anna and Rachel “The A Team”  Dr. Wallin is awesome and as impressed as I was - Doc blew me away with the summary email of Goals and Objectives! Wow- very detailed , focused, and driving for success. Everything is about YOU.  Anna kept saying- I don’t want to take anything away from you:). But the options and variety of ways to meet goals she presented seems unlimited. So yeah- folks want to know they are getting real value for their money and it’s a real experience that is life changing in the benefits being offered- are they attainable and sustainable? We shall see but given my experience to date - I have a great support Team- now what do I bring to the table? I will update in 2.5 months but I’m all in! Do what’s right for you - but do something :) Cenegenics- check it out and if near NC- check out Dr. Wallin and live your best life…

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUVrdQSq4kRZdEhV-fspYQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4NHBxbjlBRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Wallin and his staff are friendly, professional, and extremely thorough.  At the conclusion of the day, I felt as if I knew myself (healthwise) better than ever before.  It's only been a week since my visit and already I'm seeing and feeling a difference in my health.

reviews.text:
I loved Dr. G when he ran things! He would NEVER oversell me! I've gone to many places and always been oversold. I would bring things up to Dr. G and he would honestly tell me (most of the time) that I didn't yet need that procedure. I have NEVER  had that ANYWHERE! I went to CAMI last week and had a $3,100 credit (mind you, it was $6,000 2 yrs ago). They made sure to do procedures worth $3,000 on something I didn't even ask or care about! I got a " mini lower face lift" when the only thing I wanted or cared about was my
Marionette Lines between my nose and lips and a little pull down on my corners of my lips. Instead, I got tons of filler in my chin for a dent, that I have never noticed (nor has any of my friends, when I asked) and filler along my chin (not needed). AND worst of all my original concern,  my Marionette lines are not filled ENOUGH (like the last time I had them done)! Dr. G would have NEVER just saw that credit sitting in my account and said to himself, let's make sure to use that ALL today! As far as I  concerned this is just a med spa trying to oversell you to make quotas. The staff is nice BUT I can pay thousands of dollars for  anyone to be nice to me!

I also still have a $499 credit with them that I am willing to walk away from because I now feel they will just do whatever to me to get their money! 43 yr old w f.

reviews.text: I visited CAMI yesterday for Botox to help with my TMJ issues (clenching, grinding, and the headaches that come along with it), and I had such a great experience with Katie. Her personable and friendly approach immediately put me at ease, and I really appreciated how knowledgeable she was. The injections in my jaw and temples were quick and smooth, and I left feeling confident in the care I received. I highly recommend Katie for anyone considering treatment—she’s professional, compassionate, and truly cares about her patients.

Clare is completely different.

She truly cares about her patients and takes the time to listen, think outside the box, and look deeper than just a lab number. For the first time in a very long time, I feel like someone finally saw the full picture — and knew how to help.

Under Clare’s care, my health has completely transformed, and I finally feel like myself again. Finding a provider I trust this much has been such a gift.

If you’re looking for someone compassionate, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in your wellbeing, I cannot recommend Clare and Holly Springs Hormones enough. She has truly changed my life.

reviews.text:
I’ve been seeing Dr. Scott to help manage the early symptoms of perimenopause, and I couldn’t be happier with the care I’ve received. From my very first appointment, Dr. Scott was professional, insightful, and attentive. He took the time to really listen to my concerns and offered thoughtful, effective guidance.

Each follow-up has been positive—Dr. Scott makes me feel heard and supported. It’s such a relief to work with a doctor who truly understands the challenges of hormonal changes and approaches them with compassion and expertise, even if it is outside the box of traditional (and almost always lacking) perimenopausal treatment. I feel optimistic about navigating the changes ahead because of Dr. Scott.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ97W__UYlVIgReoKxPJMe7hE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s5alpIbFdiMjU1VG1Wa2QzbHRSMmhsWTAxQ09XYxAB
reviews.text: I came to Dr Scott after I moved to NC in 2023. The move completely threw me out of whack. I was dealing with hormonal issues, hypothyroidism, adrenal fatigue and dysautonomia, and I felt horrible.  Dr Scott helped me overcome my terrible symptoms through consistency and patience. He had a protocol and advised me to be patient and stay on his protocol. It didn’t happen overnight because I had so many issues, but I can honestly say that today I feel so much better than when I walked into his office that first meeting filled with anxiety. He balanced my hormones with HRT, my thyroid with NP Thyroid, and worked on my adrenals with adrenal supplements. He advised me on diet and other ways to calm my nervous system down. He’s one of the few docs out there who tries to get to the root of the problem. I’m grateful I found him.

reviews.text: I truly enjoyed Dr Scott's office and HCG program! Dr Scott has a great bedside manner and listens to your situation to help you fit the program into your life. I am a nurse and work 7pm to 7 am which poses some problems when dieting; but Dr Scott sat down with me and helped me figure it out. reviews.name: places/ChIJaQUwlEYlVIgRgVBUqoGYXIs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtXy1DdnBRRRAB
reviews.text: I heard about Dr. Shapiro when I asked for help in one of my FB groups. I had and checked other options but the moment of my first interaction with Megan I knew in my heart that I was calling the right place for me. I honestly give Dr. Shapiro and Megan 50 out of 5 stars, yes, that good. Here is why: communication: sometimes you just need to be heard, most places that we call today for any service or products either take forever to answer or the person answering is in a rush. Megan took the time to explain to me the services and answered all my questions. That is how I knew this office is “the one” 💖. Paperwork: easy, thorough, easy to understand and complete, it made sense. And no, sometimes, questions make no sense. Consultation: OMG! Talk about a doctor who is compassionate, excellent listener, he knows his business and he knows how to help. If you have experienced menopause you know how emotional and sometimes, irrational one can be. I loved that he educates the patient before simply giving you a pill or a medication. He was thorough, candid and so excited to help me. He is my forever hormone guardian angel and I cannot wait to improve and be my best. I believe that health improvement should always be our top priority and this is my most precious and priceless investment. I HIGHLY recommend Dr. Scott ❤️😘😘😘!

reviews.name: places/ChIJaQUwlEYlVIgRgVBUqoGYXIs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwMWZTNnp3RRAB
reviews.text: I recently moved to Monroe and had been seeing a Doctor in Charlotte for my testosterone treatment but it was now too far of a distance. Dr. Shapiro went as far as to email me himself and even calling me after hours to get to the bottom of some issues that were just misunderstandings through communication and delays from my previous doctors office. This practice is so patient and beyond willing to help you get back to feeling your best. I have never dealt with a doctor like Dr. Shapiro who will deal with you directly to ensure you are taken care of. I’m very pleased that we were able to work it out in the end and I highly recommend anybody to give Dr. Shapiro and his staff an opportunity as I can’t see how in the end you won’t be very pleased with your experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlbgSrcD3rIkRvWTD-HNmIm8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDaExuT2lRRRAB
reviews.text:
Do you know why most customers in the healthcare arena do not take time to write a review on their healthcare provider?  The answer is quite simple!  Average or below average is the grade most patients would grade their entire interaction and experience with most doctors and their staff when requiring medical care!  The patient and the caregiver feel nothing more than a forgotten number and a paid co-pay.  Dr. Arthur Zacco and his Office Manager extraordinaire Melissa!  I have been in the health care field arena for over 20 years on the medical side, as a patient, and most recently as a caregiver for my girlfriend who is experiencing hair loss due to post-sepsis recovery.  Before arriving at Dr. Zacco's office, we wasted two months chasing down and waiting for appointments with two dermatologists to address my family's life-altering challenge of hair loss.  I will save you time and not even count up all the mistakes and errors that were made in communication, test results, staff incompetence etc.  We were running out of options and losing hair daily.  Thank God my girlfriend was smart enough to go online looking for a doctor that thought outside the box and wasn't a prisoner of Western Medicine instead looking for homeopathic alternative ways to look at our hair loss problem.  From our first interaction with Melissa our initial consult, Dr. Zacco's 29 years of experience in the medical field along with his focus on antiaging / hair loss our prayers were answered.  To say that this Dr. and Melissa changed our life in one physical appointment and treatment (PRP) platelet-rich plasma would be a major understatement.  They ACTUALLY listened to everything we said to get them up to speed with our desperation and stomach-turning disappointment with our previous TWO dermatologists.  As a caregiver, it brought great relief to me because of the thoroughness he exhibited gathering the patient history like something I have never seen before.  His tailored PRP treatment approach to my girlfriend after one treatment yielded results within two weeks.  The problem was subsiding the fallout of the hair loss was noticeably less (because I collected and dated it) and the hair growth process was visibly being seen.  Let's just say I have a big mouth and this office's treatment of my girlfriend has left me at a loss for words (except for this review).  We are going back for second treatment this week and I could care less how much the treatment costs.  You can't put a price on restoring a family's happiness, peace of mind, and joy while at the same time putting an end to hopelessness, fear, anger, and sadness which is what we had to endure wasting our time with TWO dermatologists that could care less if she were bald today!  If as a patient and/or a caregiver you find yourself at a crossroads with your current level of treatment or lack thereof from your healthcare provider team, call Dr. Arthur Sacco DO (Doctor of Osteopathic medicine) and get good sound advice from him and his staff that truly is out of this world!
Sincerely,
Todd B.

reviews.text:
Does your doctor actually sit down with you, walk you through your labs, and design a nutrition and supplement plan built around you—or are you still stuck in the 15-minute prescription factory they call “traditional medicine”?

I spent years trying to “optimize” my health inside that system, and all I got was a longer list of prescriptions and a shorter list of answers.  At one point, I realized I was the one telling my doctor about new supplements and testing methods—never a great sign.

Then I found Dr. Deibel. Finally, a doctor who measures, tracks, plans, and educates.  His knowledge is unmatched and his passion is contagious.

Since working with him, I’ve felt more focused, energetic, and confident in my ability to crush my long-term goals.

Dr. Deibel isn’t the “see you in six months for refills” type—he’s your co-pilot for high-performance health. He’ll keep you tuned up, locked in, and probably make you rethink everything you thought “normal” performance meant.

If you’re serious about health, wellness, fitness and have long term wellness goals, go see Dr. Diebel – your future self will thank you.

Halo Integrative Wellness & Aesthetics is truly in a class of its own. His dedication to his patients goes far beyond routine visits; he takes the time to listen, educate, and ensure that each person receives the safest and most effective treatment possible.

J. Christopher Wright, MA, PA-C brings a wealth of knowledge, insight, and an empathetic approach that makes every interaction feel personal and reassuring. His ability to explain complex medical concepts with clarity and patience is unmatched, and his collaborative spirit truly enhances the care experience.

And then there’s Cyril Tiedman—a nonpareil and absolutely incomparable presence within the practice. Cyril’s attention to detail, professionalism, and heart-centered approach elevate every patient encounter. Simply put, Halo would not be the same without her.

This is a team that not only practices medicine, but also delivers a level of humanity, respect, and genuine care that is rare to find. I am deeply grateful to be under their care and will continue to recommend Halo Integrative Wellness & Aesthetics without hesitation.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRWXSEI9YrIkRyfOgPe9T-WU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aUE1XVTJZV1JLVHpWd1FXMWlSRUpUWkZKeFkzYxAB
reviews.text:
I really tried to keep giving them chances, but I ultimately left to find another doctor after being with Live Well as a patient for awhile. After my first appointment, subsequent appointments felt very rushed. I was billed a full charge for one sick visit and they repeatedly told me my insurance had paid. I was constantly contacted about paying the full balance. I kept asking them office they were sure the balance was correct, to which the office insisted it was. Well, after getting my my insurance company involved, it was discovered the office never filed the claim. No apology or follow up, but they did correct the bill.

Two referrals of mine have experienced the same, and one was told by Dr. Betts that her insurance did not cover a particular weight loss program, so she paid the full amount. Only to find out that her insurance actually does cover the medication involved with that same program. My referral felt scammed.

I greatly appreciate this because I have felt judgment with some past providers, but with Datanya I always feel affirmed. I’ve been using Renew Vitality for my TRT for a few years now, and overall I’m pretty satisfied. The sign-up process was straightforward: got my labs done, had a telehealth consult, and my prescription shipped without much hassle. I definitely noticed improvements in my energy, mood, and even gym performance, so the treatment itself has been very beneficial for me.

The convenience is huge — I don’t have to sit around in waiting rooms, and meds get delivered right to me. Pricing is also pretty reasonable compared to local clinics I checked out.

reviews.text: This is the place I finally got victory over my weight and my health. I started my journey with Renew Vitality in October 2024, with Wes as my Patient Coordinator. He led me through all the things I needed to do to get started, and made everything easy. After completing the application, getting lab work done, and having an online consult with a doctor, I was on my way with weekly injections. Wes was so helpful and answered all my questions and gave great advice every step of the way. I completed the program in July 2024 because I had lost all the weight I needed to lose - a total of 60 pounds! I have been on many diets in my life, but always struggled with hunger and cravings, and always put the weight back on. With this program, I was not hungry, I did not crave sweets, and I was full after only small portions of food. This truly was the best and easiest “diet” I have ever been on.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRxCH9aPzqYkRwvhVEi-rOFA/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYc3BYZk13EAE
reviews.text:
I've been with Renew for over a year now with Joe Walsh as my care coordinator and taking care of everything I need.
Joe is always on point, even called me to wish me a happy birthday today!!  He is always available when I call or text with questions, as well as the other Renew team members.
I initially signed up for TRT, then added on Growth Hormone treatments and then a Semiglutide most recently.
I am 48, today!!! hahaha, and had been experiencing different symptoms from Low T for quite a few years and just kept trying to fight through.
I am very active, train in martial arts and recoveries were just taking so much longer nowadays and nick knack injuries kept piling on, most likely from training without proper recovery time.
But proper recovery time now I was being limited to only training once or twice a week.
The TRT has dramatically improved my work out recovery time, my cardio vascular circulation and libido, just to name the 3 most obvious.
Always dealing with little injuries and about 25 years of herniated discs in my back I wanted to try one of the Growth Hormone plans.
I tried BPC-157 the 1st time and Sermorelin after that.
Both worked well.  Small "knots" in my back, little nerve pinches, things like that started to go away.
Towards the end of the 1st year of being on the Renew program, a pretty serious gym injury led to a knee surgery which incidentally led to some aggravated disc issues in my lower back.
I had to take a bit of a break from the programs.
I could not train for quite a few months and unfortunately put on that dreaded extra 15 or "so" pounds.
Hoping to fast track getting back into shape and the gym, once healthy again, I decided to try the Semaglutide program.
I lost 10 pounds in the 1st two weeks.  It is pretty crazy how well that stuff works.
If You are looking for a little more pep in your step, faster recover times, help with long term nagging injuries, weight loss, libido...
Joe Walsh at Renew Vitality Clinic in Wilmington, NC is the Guy to talk to for sure.
If You know me and read this and are still unsure, give me a call and I'll tell you more about my experiences.

reviews.name: places/ChIJRxCH9aPzqYkRwvhVEi-rOFA/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxamM3TXhnRRAB
reviews.text:
Being 31 years old I never thought I’d have to experience low T. I noticed changes in my mood and body that impacted me in so many negative ways. I started doing some research and came across renew vitality. Dr. Henry was awesome. He discussed the importance of an increased T level and helped me to build a medication plan that worked for me. I decided to go with the compounded Testosterone Cream as I didn’t want to inject myself.

The company is so friendly and professional. Nick V has been quick to respond any time of day or night and had my medication shipped promptly. After just 2 months of treatment I now have a level reading at 784.  This is on the higher end where I feel amazing. I’ve noticed a lot of physical changes in my muscle mass and my fat has started to go away.

I recommend anyone young or older that may be dealing with low T to contact Renew Vitality.. get your confidence back!
